---
title: "thesis_graphs_tables"
author: "ID_234731"
date: "2026-04-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r packages, include = F}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse) 
library(ggplot2)
library(haven)
library(zoo)
library(stargazer)
library(corrplot)
library(psych)
library(modelsummary)
library(rdrobust)
library(rddtools)
library(fixest)
library(purrr)
library(gt)
library(patchwork)
library(flextable)
library(tibble)


```

```{r load data, include = F}

cog_test_sgl <- readRDS("[...] Master Thesis/Masterthesis/cog_test_sgl.rds")

cog_test_svrl <- readRDS("[...] Master Thesis/Masterthesis/cog_test_svrl.rds")


```


## Sample Summary 

```{r}
df <- cog_test_sgl |>

  mutate(

    # Gender
    gender = ifelse(sex == 1, "Female", "Male"),

    # Birth Cohort
    birth_cohort = case_when(
      birthyear >= 1936 & birthyear <= 1940 ~ "1936–40",
      birthyear >= 1941 & birthyear <= 1945 ~ "1941–45",
      birthyear >= 1946 & birthyear <= 1950 ~ "1946–50",
      birthyear >= 1951 & birthyear <= 1955 ~ "1951–55",
      birthyear >= 1956 & birthyear <= 1961 ~ "1956–61",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    # Education level
    education_level = case_when(
      edu_time < 10 ~ "<10 years",
      edu_time >= 10 & edu_time <= 13 ~ "10–13 years",
      edu_time > 13 ~ ">13 years",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    # Occupation
    occupation_type = ifelse(manual_worker == 1,
                             "Manual",
                             "Non-manual"),

    # Marital status
    marital_status_cat = ifelse(marit_status == 1,
                                "Married",
                                "Not married"),

    # Residence
    residence_cat = ifelse(live_west == 1,
                           "West Germany",
                           "East Germany"),

    # Place of birth
    birthplace_cat = ifelse(born_abroad == 1,
                            "Abroad",
                            "Germany")

  )


```

```{r}

fmt_mean_sd <- function(x){

  m <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  s <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)

  sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", m, s)

}

fmt_count <- function(x){

  n <- sum(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  p <- 100 * n / sum(!is.na(x))

  sprintf("%d (%.1f)", n, p)

}

N_overall <- nrow(df)
N_emp     <- sum(df$retired == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
N_ret     <- sum(df$retired == 1, na.rm = TRUE)

table_structure <- list(

"Result ANT" = list(var = "result_ant", type = "continuous"),
"Result SDT" = list(var = "result_sdt", type = "continuous"),

"Gender" = list(var = "gender", type = "categorical"),

"Birth Cohort" = list(var = "birth_cohort", type = "categorical"),

"Education level" = list(var = "education_level", type = "categorical"),

"Type of Occupation" = list(var = "occupation_type", type = "categorical"),

"Marital status" = list(var = "marital_status_cat", type = "categorical"),

"Place of Residence" = list(var = "residence_cat", type = "categorical"),

"Place of Birth" = list(var = "birthplace_cat", type = "categorical")

)
```

```{r}

tab <- imap_dfr(table_structure, function(info, label){

  var <- info$var
  type <- info$type

  header <- tibble(
    Variable = label,
    Overall = "",
    Employed = "",
    Retired = ""
  )

  if(type == "continuous"){

    row <- tibble(
      Variable = paste0("  ", label),
      Overall = fmt_mean_sd(df[[var]]),
      Employed = fmt_mean_sd(df[[var]][df$retired == 0]),
      Retired = fmt_mean_sd(df[[var]][df$retired == 1])
    )

    bind_rows(header, row)

  } else {

    levels <- sort(unique(df[[var]]))

    rows <- map_dfr(levels, function(lvl){

      tibble(
        Variable = paste0("  ", lvl),
        Overall = fmt_count(df[[var]] == lvl),
        Employed = fmt_count(df[[var]][df$retired == 0] == lvl),
        Retired = fmt_count(df[[var]][df$retired == 1] == lvl)
      )

    })

    bind_rows(header, rows)

  }

})

```

```{r}

colnames(tab) <- c(
  "Variable",
  paste0("Overall (N=", N_overall, ")"),
  paste0("Employed (N=", N_emp, ")"),
  paste0("Retired (N=", N_ret, ")")
)

tab_out <- tab |>

  gt() |>

  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(
      rows = !grepl("^\\s", Variable)
    )
  ) |>

  cols_width(
    Variable ~ px(260),
    everything() ~ px(150)
  ) |>

  tab_options(
    table.border.top.width = px(2),
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(1)
  )

tab_out
```

##2nd

```{r}


df <- cog_test_sgl |>
  mutate(
    gender             = ifelse(sex == 1, "Female", "Male"),
    birth_cohort       = case_when(
      birthyear >= 1936 & birthyear <= 1940 ~ "1936–40",
      birthyear >= 1941 & birthyear <= 1945 ~ "1941–45",
      birthyear >= 1946 & birthyear <= 1950 ~ "1946–50",
      birthyear >= 1951 & birthyear <= 1955 ~ "1951–55",
      birthyear >= 1956 & birthyear <= 1961 ~ "1956–61",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    education_level    = case_when(
      edu_time < 10                        ~ "<10 years",
      edu_time >= 10 & edu_time <= 13     ~ "10–13 years",
      edu_time > 13                        ~ ">13 years",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    occupation_type    = ifelse(manual_worker == 1, "Manual", "Non-manual"),
    marital_status_cat = ifelse(marit_status == 1, "Married", "Not married"),
    residence_cat      = ifelse(live_west == 1, "West Germany", "East Germany"),
    birthplace_cat     = ifelse(born_abroad == 1, "Abroad", "Germany")
  )

fmt_mean_sd <- function(x) {
  sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), sd(x, na.rm = TRUE))
}

fmt_count <- function(x, lvl) {
  valid <- x[!is.na(x)]
  n     <- sum(valid == lvl)
  p     <- 100 * n / length(valid)
  sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", n, p)
}

N_overall <- nrow(df)
N_emp     <- sum(df$retired == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
N_ret     <- sum(df$retired == 1, na.rm = TRUE)

table_structure <- list(
  "Result ANT"         = list(var = "result_ant",        type = "continuous"),
  "Result SDT"         = list(var = "result_sdt",        type = "continuous"),
  "Gender"             = list(var = "gender",            type = "categorical"),
  "Birth Cohort"       = list(var = "birth_cohort",      type = "categorical"),
  "Education level"    = list(var = "education_level",   type = "categorical"),
  "Type of Occupation" = list(var = "occupation_type",   type = "categorical"),
  "Marital status"     = list(var = "marital_status_cat", type = "categorical"),
  "Place of Residence" = list(var = "residence_cat",     type = "categorical"),
  "Place of Birth"     = list(var = "birthplace_cat",    type = "categorical")
)

tab <- imap_dfr(table_structure, function(info, label) {
  var  <- info$var
  type <- info$type

  header <- tibble(Variable = label, Overall = "", Employed = "", Retired = "")

  if (type == "continuous") {
    row <- tibble(
      Variable = paste0("  ", label),
      Overall  = fmt_mean_sd(df[[var]]),
      Employed = fmt_mean_sd(df[[var]][df$retired == 0]),
      Retired  = fmt_mean_sd(df[[var]][df$retired == 1])
    )
    bind_rows(header, row)

  } else {
    lvls <- sort(unique(na.omit(df[[var]])))
    rows <- map_dfr(lvls, function(lvl) {
      tibble(
        Variable = paste0("  ", lvl),
        # fmt_count bekommt jetzt Vektor + Level (kein == vorab)
        Overall  = fmt_count(df[[var]],                   lvl),
        Employed = fmt_count(df[[var]][df$retired == 0], lvl),
        Retired  = fmt_count(df[[var]][df$retired == 1], lvl)
      )
    })
    bind_rows(header, rows)
  }
})

header_rows <- which(!grepl("^\\s", tab$Variable))

colnames(tab) <- c(
  "Variable",
  paste0("Overall (N = ",  N_overall, ")"),
  paste0("Employed (N = ", N_emp,     ")"),
  paste0("Retired (N = ",  N_ret,     ")")
)

ft <- flextable(tab) |>
  bold(i = header_rows, j = 1) |>
  padding(i = setdiff(seq_len(nrow(tab)), header_rows),
          j = 1, padding.left = 16) |>

  padding(padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1, part = "body") |>
  padding(padding.top = 2, padding.bottom = 2, part = "header") |>
  hrule(rule = "exact", part = "body") |>
  height(height = 0.4, part = "body") |>    # in cm — weiter reduzieren: 0.3
  height(height = 0.5, part = "header") |>

  width(j = 1, width = 2.6) |>
  width(j = 2:4, width = 1.6) |>
  bold(part = "header") |>
  align(part = "header", align = "center") |>
  align(j = 2:4, align = "center") |>
  border_remove() |>
  hline_top(part = "header",
             border = officer::fp_border(width = 1.5)) |>
  hline_bottom(part = "header",
               border = officer::fp_border(width = 0.75)) |>
  hline_bottom(part = "body",
               border = officer::fp_border(width = 1.5)) |>
  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all") |>
  fontsize(size = 11, part = "all") |>
  set_caption(
    caption = "Table 1. Sample characteristics by retirement status"
  ) |>
  add_footer_lines(values = c(
    "Notes: Continuous variables reported as Mean (SD). Categorical variables reported as N (%).",
    "Percentages are calculated within each column. ANT = Attention Network Task; SDT = Signal Detection Task."
  )) |>
  italic(part = "footer") |>
  fontsize(size = 10, part = "footer") |>
  padding(padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1, part = "footer")

ft

 save_as_docx(ft, path = "sample_summary.docx")

```


## Variable Summary

Table showing variable summary statistics.

```{r prepare data}

table_structure <- list(

"1. Outcome Variables for Cognition" = c(
  result_sdt = "Result Symbol Digit Test (SDT)",
  result_ant = "Result Animal Naming Test (ANT)"
  ),

"2. Health Status" = c(
  pcs = "Physical Health (SF12)",
  mcs = "Mental Health (SF12)"
  ),

"3. Cognitive Stimulation" = c(
  nr_close_friends = "Number of close friends",
  hrs_chores_weekd = "Time Use: Household Chores",
  hrs_childcare_weekd = "Time Use: Childcare",
  hrs_edu_weekd = "Time Use: Education",
  hrs_repair_weekd = "Time Use: Repairs and Gardening",
  frq_sport = "Frequency: Sport", 
  frq_classics = "Frequency: Classical Theater",
  frq_cindisc = "Frequency: Cinema, Disco or Similar",   
  frq_arts = "Frequency: Art, Music or Dance",
  frq_voluntr = "Frequency: Volunteering"
  ),

"4. Covariates" = c(
  age = "Age",
  sex = "Sex", 
  edu_time = "Years of Formal Education",
  manual_worker = "Blue-collar Work",
  married = "Marital Status"
  )
)

get_stats <- function(v, retired){

tibble(
Mean = mean(v, na.rm=TRUE),
SD = sd(v, na.rm=TRUE),
Min = min(v, na.rm=TRUE),
Max = max(v, na.rm=TRUE),
N = sum(!is.na(v)),
`Mean non-retirees` = mean(v[retired==0], na.rm=TRUE),
`Mean retirees` = mean(v[retired==1], na.rm=TRUE),
`t-Statistic` = as.numeric(t.test(v ~ retired)$statistic)
)

}

```

```{r}

tab <- imap_dfr(table_structure, function(vars, panel){

panel_header <- tibble(Variable = panel)

rows <- imap_dfr(vars, function(label, var){

get_stats(cog_test_sgl[[var]], cog_test_sgl$retired) |>
mutate(Variable = label)

})

bind_rows(panel_header, rows)

}) |>
select(Variable, everything())


```

Generating Output

```{r table out}

tab_out <- datasummary_df(
  tab,
  fmt = 3,
  output = "gt"
) |>

  # Paneltitel fett
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(
      rows = grepl("^[A-Z]\\.", Variable)
    )
  ) |>

  tab_style(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = "top",
      weight = px(2)
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      rows = grepl("^[A-Z]\\.", Variable)
    )
  ) |>

  fmt_integer(columns = c(N)) |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(Mean, SD, Min, Max, `Mean non-retirees`, `Mean retirees`, `t-Statistic`),
    decimals = 2
  ) |>

  cols_width(
    Variable ~ px(300),
    everything() ~ px(100)
  ) |>

  tab_options(
    table.border.top.width = px(2),
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(1)
  )

tab_out
```

##2nd


```{r}


table_structure <- list(
  "1. Outcome Variables for Cognition" = c(
    result_sdt = "Result Symbol Digit Test (SDT)",
    result_ant = "Result Animal Naming Test (ANT)"
  ),
  "2. Health Status" = c(
    pcs = "Physical Health (SF12)",
    mcs = "Mental Health (SF12)"
  ),
  "3. Cognitive Stimulation" = c(
    nr_close_friends    = "Number of close friends",
    hrs_chores_weekd    = "Time Use: Household Chores",
    hrs_childcare_weekd = "Time Use: Childcare",
    hrs_edu_weekd       = "Time Use: Education",
    hrs_repair_weekd    = "Time Use: Repairs and Gardening",
    frq_sport           = "Frequency: Sport",
    frq_classics        = "Frequency: Classical Theater",
    frq_cindisc         = "Frequency: Cinema, Disco or Similar",
    frq_arts            = "Frequency: Art, Music or Dance",
    frq_voluntr         = "Frequency: Volunteering"
  ),
  "4. Covariates" = c(
    age           = "Age",
    sex           = "Sex",
    edu_time      = "Years of Formal Education",
    manual_worker = "Blue-collar Work",
    married       = "Marital Status"
  )
)

get_stats <- function(v, retired) {
  tt  <- tryCatch(t.test(v ~ retired), error = function(e) NULL)
  tst <- if (!is.null(tt)) as.numeric(tt$statistic) else NA_real_
  pv  <- if (!is.null(tt)) tt$p.value                else NA_real_
  stars <- case_when(
    is.na(pv)   ~ "",
    pv < 0.001  ~ "***",
    pv < 0.01   ~ "**",
    pv < 0.05   ~ "*",
    TRUE        ~ ""
  )
  tibble(
    Mean               = mean(v, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD                 = sd(v,   na.rm = TRUE),
    Min                = min(v,  na.rm = TRUE),
    Max                = max(v,  na.rm = TRUE),
    N                  = sum(!is.na(v)),
    `Mean non-retirees` = mean(v[retired == 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    `Mean retirees`     = mean(v[retired == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
    `t-Statistic`       = if_else(!is.na(tst),
                            paste0(sprintf("%.2f", tst), stars),
                            NA_character_)
  )
}

tab <- imap_dfr(table_structure, function(vars, panel) {
  panel_header <- tibble(Variable = panel)
  rows <- imap_dfr(vars, function(label, var) {
    get_stats(cog_test_sgl[[var]], cog_test_sgl$retired) |>
      mutate(Variable = label)
  })
  bind_rows(panel_header, rows)
}) |>
  select(Variable, everything()) |>
  mutate(across(c(Mean, SD, Min, Max,
                  `Mean non-retirees`, `Mean retirees`),
                \(x) if_else(!is.na(x), sprintf("%.2f", x), "")),
         N = if_else(!is.na(N), as.character(N), ""),
         `t-Statistic` = replace_na(`t-Statistic`, ""))

header_rows <- which(grepl("^[0-9]\\.", tab$Variable))

ft <- flextable(tab) |>

  bold(i = header_rows, j = 1) |>
  hline(i = header_rows,
        border = officer::fp_border(width = 0.75),
        part = "body") |>

  padding(i = setdiff(seq_len(nrow(tab)), header_rows),
          j = 1, padding.left = 14) |>

  padding(padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1, part = "body") |>
  padding(padding.top = 2, padding.bottom = 2, part = "header") |>
  hrule(rule = "exact", part = "body") |>
  height(height = 0.4, part = "body") |>
  height(height = 0.5, part = "header") |>

  width(j = 1, width = 2.8) |>
  width(j = 2:9, width = 0.85) |>

  # Ausrichtung
  align(part = "header", align = "center") |>
  align(j = 2:9, align = "center") |>
  bold(part = "header") |>

  border_remove() |>
  hline_top(part = "header",
             border = officer::fp_border(width = 1.5)) |>
  hline_bottom(part = "header",
               border = officer::fp_border(width = 0.75)) |>
  hline_bottom(part = "body",
               border = officer::fp_border(width = 1.5)) |>

  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all") |>
  fontsize(size = 10, part = "all") |>

  set_caption(caption = "Table 2. Summary statistics by retirement status") |>
  add_footer_lines(values = c(
    "Notes: Mean and SD reported for all variables. t-Statistic from two-sample Welch t-test (employed vs. retired).",
    "Significance levels: * p < 0.05, ** p < 0.01, *** p < 0.001."
  )) |>
  italic(part = "footer") |>
  fontsize(size = 9, part = "footer") |>
  padding(padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1, part = "footer")

ft

save_as_docx(ft, path = "variable_summary_stats.docx")

```



## Cognitive Performance over Time

Plot showing the trajectory of fluid and crystallized intelligence over time in the analytic sample.


```{r preparing data}



df_long <- cog_test_svrl %>%
  mutate(age_year = floor(age)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(result_ant, result_sdt),
    names_to = "test",
    values_to = "score"
  )

df_means <- df_long %>%
  group_by(age_year, test) %>%
  summarise(mean_score = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

df_sex <- df_long %>%
  group_by(age_year, test, sex) %>%
  summarise(mean_score = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

df_occ <- df_long %>%
  group_by(age_year, test, manual_worker) %>%
  summarise(mean_score = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

df_pens <- df_long %>%
  group_by(age_year, test, retired) %>%
  summarise(mean_score = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

```




```{r sample out}


perform <- ggplot(df_means, aes(x = age_year, y = mean_score)) +
  
  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(df_means, test == "result_ant" & age_year >= 56),
    aes(color = "Test 1"),
    method = "loess",
    se = FALSE
  ) +

  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(df_means, test == "result_sdt"),
    aes(color = "Test 2"),
    method = "loess",
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#1B4F72", "#B03A2E"),
    labels = c("ANT", "SDT")
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    name = "Age (years)",
    breaks = seq(min(df_means$age_year),
                 max(df_means$age_year), by = 5)
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Average Test Score",
    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    color = NULL,
    title = "Test Performance by Age"
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )


ggsave(
  filename = "performance_time.png",
  plot = perform,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)

```


## Factor Performance (Gender and Occupation)


```{r factor sex}

pgender <- ggplot(
  df_sex %>% filter(!is.na(mean_score)),
  aes(x = age_year, y = mean_score, color = factor(sex))
) +

  geom_smooth(
    method = "loess",
    se = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1.3,
    span = 0.6,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +

  facet_wrap(
    ~test,
    labeller = labeller(
      test = c("result_ant" = "ANT", "result_sdt" = "SDT")
    ),
    scales = "fixed"
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#1B4F72", "#B03A2E"),
    labels = c("Men", "Women")
  ) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    name = "Age (years)",
    breaks = seq(min(df_sex$age_year, na.rm = TRUE),
                 max(df_sex$age_year, na.rm = TRUE), by = 5)
  ) +

  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Average Test Score",
    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6)
  ) +

  labs(
    color = NULL,
    title = "Test Trajectories by Gender"
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +

  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey85"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey85"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "performance_gender.png",
  plot = pgender,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)
```




```{r factor occupation}

pocc <- ggplot(
  df_occ %>% 
    filter(!is.na(mean_score), !is.na(manual_worker)),
  aes(x = age_year, y = mean_score, color = factor(manual_worker))
) +

  geom_smooth(
    method = "loess",
    se = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1.3,
    span = 0.6,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +

  facet_wrap(
    ~test,
    labeller = labeller(
      test = c("result_ant" = "ANT", "result_sdt" = "SDT")
    ),
    scales = "fixed"
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#4D4D4D", "#2C7FB8"),
    labels = c("White-collar workers", "Blue-collar workers"),
    drop = TRUE
  ) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    name = "Age (years)",
    breaks = seq(min(df_occ$age_year, na.rm = TRUE),
                 max(df_occ$age_year, na.rm = TRUE), by = 5)
  ) +

  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Average Test Score",
    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6)
  ) +

  labs(
    color = NULL,
    title = "Test Trajectory by Occupation"
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +

  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey85"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey85"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )


ggsave(
  filename = "performance_occ.png",
  plot = pocc,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)
```




```{r factor retired, echo=F}

ggplot(df_pens, aes(x = age_year, y = mean_score, color = factor(retired))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~test) +
  labs(
    x = "Age",
    y = "Average Test Score",
    color = "Retired",
    title = "Test Trajectories by Age and Retirement Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

## Results with distance to retirement thresholds

```{r prep distance to cutoff}

#setting individual cutoffs


df_cutoff <- cog_test_svrl %>%
  
  mutate(
    early_dist = age - early,
    sra_dist   = age - sra
  ) %>%
  
  mutate(
    early_dist = round(early_dist),
    sra_dist   = round(sra_dist)
  ) %>%
  
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(early_dist, sra_dist),
    names_to = "cutoff",
    values_to = "dist"
  ) %>%
  
  filter(dist >= -5, dist <= 5) %>%
  
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(result_ant, result_sdt),
    names_to = "test",
    values_to = "score"
  )


df_cutoff_summary <- df_cutoff %>%
  
  group_by(cutoff, dist, test) %>%
  
  summarise(
    mean_score = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = sum(!is.na(score)),
    sd = sd(score, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd / sqrt(n),
    
    ci_low  = mean_score - 1.96 * se,
    ci_high = mean_score + 1.96 * se,
    
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```


```{r plot distance cutoff}

pcutoffs <- ggplot(
  df_cutoff_summary %>% filter(!is.na(mean_score)),
  aes(x = dist, y = mean_score)
) +

  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "#1B4F72") +

  geom_point(size = 2.5, color = "#1B4F72") +

  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high),
    width = 0.15,
    linewidth = 0.8,
    color = "#1B4F72"
  ) +

  geom_vline(
    xintercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "grey40"
  ) +

  facet_grid(
    test ~ cutoff,
    labeller = labeller(
      test = c("result_ant" = "ANT", "result_sdt" = "SDT"),
      cutoff = c("early_dist" = "Early Retirement Age",
                 "sra_dist"   = "Statutory Retirement Age")
    )
  ) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    name = "Distance to Threshold (years)",
    breaks = -5:5
  ) +

  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Average Test Score",
    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6)
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Test Performance Around Retirement Cutoffs"
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +

  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "performance_cutoffs.png",
  plot = pcutoffs,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)

```




```{r}

ggplot(check, aes(x = sra_dist, y = result_sdt)) +
  stat_summary_bin(fun = mean, bins = 30, geom = "point",
                   size = 2, color = "black") +
  
  geom_smooth(data = subset(check, sra_dist < 0),
              method = "lm", formula = y ~ x,
              se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  geom_smooth(data = subset(check, sra_dist >= 0),
              method = "lm", formula = y ~ x,
              se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Distance to Statutory Retirement Age (years)",
    y = "Average SDT Score"
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
```



```{r, include=F, echo=F}

ggplot(df_cutoff, aes(x = dist, y = score)) +

  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(df_cutoff, dist < 0),
    method = "loess",
    se = FALSE,
    color = "#B03A2E"
  ) +

  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(df_cutoff, dist >= 0),
    method = "loess",
    se = FALSE,
    color = "#2C7FB8"
  ) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  facet_grid(test ~ cutoff)
```


## Treatment Heterogeneity

```{r, echo=F, include=F}
ggplot(cog_test_sgl, aes(x = sra_dist, y = result_sdt, color = factor(manual_worker))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2) +
  
  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(cog_test_sgl, sra_dist < 0),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  
  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(cog_test_sgl, sra_dist >= 0),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Distance to Retirement Age",
    y = "SDT Score",
    color = "Blue Collar"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}

# Bandwidth 
bw <- 5

data_plot <- cog_test_sgl %>%
  filter(abs(sra_dist) <= bw)

# Binning  running variable
bin_width <- 0.5

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(
    bin = floor(sra_dist / bin_width) * bin_width,
    gender = ifelse(sex == 1, "Female", "Male"),
    occupation = ifelse(manual_worker == 1, "Blue-collar", "White-collar")
  )

binned_gender <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(bin, gender) %>%
  summarise(score = mean(result_sdt), .groups = "drop")

binned_occ <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(bin, occupation) %>%
  summarise(score = mean(result_sdt), .groups = "drop")

# Plot Gender
p_gender <- ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = sra_dist, y = result_sdt, color = gender)) +

  geom_point(data = binned_gender,
             aes(x = bin, y = score),
             size = 2) +

  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(data_plot, sra_dist < 0),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE
  ) +

  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(data_plot, sra_dist >= 0),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE
  ) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +

  labs(
    title = "A: Cognitive Test Scores by Gender",
    x = "Distance to Statutory Retirement Age",
    y = "SDT Score",
    color = ""
  ) +

  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Plot Occupation
p_occ <- ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = sra_dist, y = result_sdt, color = occupation)) +

  geom_point(data = binned_occ,
             aes(x = bin, y = score),
             size = 2) +

  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(data_plot, sra_dist < 0),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE
  ) +

  geom_smooth(
    data = subset(data_plot, sra_dist >= 0),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE
  ) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +

  labs(
    title = "B: Cognitive Test Scores by Occupation",
    x = "Distance to Statutory Retirement Age",
    y = "SDT Score",
    color = ""
  ) +

  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Panels 

final_plot <- p_gender + p_occ

final_plot

```


```{r first plot}


colors_gender <- c("Women" = "#B03A2E", "Men" = "#1B4F72")
colors_occ    <- c("Blue-collar" = "#2C7FB8", "White-collar" = "#4D4D4D")

# Bandwidth
bw <- 5

make_plots <- function(outcome_var, y_label, panel_labels) {
  
  data_plot <- cog_test_sgl %>%
    filter(abs(sra_dist) <= bw) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[outcome_var]]),
           !is.na(sra_dist),
           !is.na(sex),
           !is.na(manual_worker)) %>%
    mutate(
      bin        = floor(sra_dist / 0.5) * 0.5,
      gender     = ifelse(sex == 1, "Women", "Men"),
      occupation = ifelse(manual_worker == 1, "Blue-collar", "White-collar")
    )
  
  binned_gender <- data_plot %>%
    group_by(bin, gender) %>%
    summarise(score = mean(.data[[outcome_var]]), .groups = "drop")
  
  binned_occ <- data_plot %>%
    group_by(bin, occupation) %>%
    summarise(score = mean(.data[[outcome_var]]), .groups = "drop")
  
  # Theme
  plot_theme <- theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position    = "bottom",
      legend.title       = element_blank(),
      legend.text        = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.title         = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text          = element_text(size = 9),
      plot.title         = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    )
  
  # Gender Plot
  p_gender <- ggplot(data_plot,
                     aes(x = sra_dist, y = .data[[outcome_var]], color = gender)) +
    geom_point(data = binned_gender,
               aes(x = bin, y = score),
               size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(data = subset(data_plot, sra_dist < 0),
                aes(color = gender, fill = gender),
                method = "lm", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.15, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(data = subset(data_plot, sra_dist >= 0),
                aes(color = gender, fill = gender),
                method = "lm", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.15, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    scale_color_manual(values = colors_gender) +
    scale_fill_manual(values  = colors_gender) +
    labs(title = paste0(panel_labels[1], ": Cognitive Test Scores by Gender"),
         x = "Distance to Statutory Retirement Age",
         y = y_label) +
    plot_theme
  
  # Occupation Plot
  p_occ <- ggplot(data_plot,
                  aes(x = sra_dist, y = .data[[outcome_var]], color = occupation)) +
    geom_point(data = binned_occ,
               aes(x = bin, y = score),
               size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(data = subset(data_plot, sra_dist < 0),
                aes(color = occupation, fill = occupation),
                method = "lm", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.15, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(data = subset(data_plot, sra_dist >= 0),
                aes(color = occupation , fill = occupation),
                method = "lm", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.15, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    scale_color_manual(values = colors_occ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values  = colors_occ) +
    labs(title = paste0(panel_labels[2], ": Cognitive Test Scores by Occupation"),
         x = "Distance to Statutory Retirement Age",
         y = y_label) +
    plot_theme
  
  list(gender = p_gender, occ = p_occ)
}

plots_sdt <- make_plots("result_sdt", "SDT Score",  c("A", "B"))
plots_ant <- make_plots("result_ant", "ANT Score",  c("C", "D"))

# 2x2 Layout
final_plot <- (plots_sdt$gender + plots_sdt$occ) /
              (plots_ant$gender + plots_ant$occ)
  

ggsave("heterogeneity_plots_fin.png",
       plot   = final_plot,
       width  = 8,
       height = 8,
       dpi    = 300,
       bg     = "white") #w=10, h=8

final_plot


ggsave(
  filename = "ttest_sdt_63.png",
  plot = p1,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)
```
